use_cases: Form submission triggers with variant styles for primary and secondary actions
Navigation action buttons with outline and ghost variants for less prominent CTAs
Call-to-action elements with destructive variant for dangerous operations
Icon-only buttons with circular sizing for compact toolbars
Composition-ready buttons using Radix Slot for polymorphic behavior with custom components
ai_summary: A reusable button component with multiple style variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for asChild composition, class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management, and standard Tailwind styling. Part of the shadcn/ui design system providing consistent, accessible button interactions across any application.
